---
title: "Research Publications"
subtitle: "Web of Science, Scopus and TR-Dizin Indexed Publications"
format: html
---

<div id="pub-list">Downloading...</div>

<script>
async function loadPublications() {
  const container = document.getElementById("pub-list");

  try {
    const response = await fetch("publications.json");
    if (!response.ok) {
      throw new Error("publications.json yüklenemedi.");
    }

    const data = await response.json();
    const groups = data.group || [];

    let works = [];
    groups.forEach(group => {
      const summaries = group["work-summary"] || [];
      summaries.forEach(work => works.push(work));
    });

    if (works.length === 0) {
      container.innerHTML = "<p>Henüz yayın bulunamadı.</p>";
      return;
    }

    function normalizeText(str) {
      return (str || "")
        .toLowerCase()
        .normalize("NFD")
        .replace(/[\u0300-\u036f]/g, "")   // aksanları temizle
        .replace(/&/g, "and")
        .replace(/[^\w\s]/g, " ")          // noktalama işaretlerini temizle
        .replace(/\s+/g, " ")
        .trim();
    }

    function getDOI(work) {
      const extIds = work["external-ids"]?.["external-id"] || [];
      for (const id of extIds) {
        const idType = (id["external-id-type"] || "").toLowerCase();
        const idValue = (id["external-id-value"] || "").trim().toLowerCase();
        if (idType === "doi" && idValue) {
          return idValue;
        }
      }
      return "";
    }

    function getRecordUrl(work) {
      const extIds = work["external-ids"]?.["external-id"] || [];
      for (const id of extIds) {
        const idUrl = id["external-id-url"]?.value || "";
        if (idUrl) return idUrl;
      }
      return work.url?.value || "";
    }

    function scoreWork(work) {
      let score = 0;

      const doi = getDOI(work);
      const journal = work["journal-title"]?.value || "";
      const year = work["publication-date"]?.year?.value || "";
      const month = work["publication-date"]?.month?.value || "";
      const day = work["publication-date"]?.day?.value || "";
      const extIds = work["external-ids"]?.["external-id"] || [];
      const title = work.title?.title?.value || "";

      if (doi) score += 100;
      if (journal) score += 20;
      if (year) score += 10;
      if (month) score += 3;
      if (day) score += 2;
      if (extIds.length > 0) score += 5;
      if (title) score += 5;

      return score;
    }

    function chooseBetterWork(existing, candidate) {
      const existingType = (existing.type || "").toLowerCase();
      const candidateType = (candidate.type || "").toLowerCase();

      // Aynı kayıt hem book hem book-chapter görünüyorsa book-chapter tercih et
      if (existingType === "book" && candidateType === "book-chapter") {
        return candidate;
      }
      if (existingType === "book-chapter" && candidateType === "book") {
        return existing;
      }

      // Daha zengin metadata taşıyan kaydı tercih et
      return scoreWork(candidate) > scoreWork(existing) ? candidate : existing;
    }

    function titleSignature(title) {
      const normalized = normalizeText(title);
      const words = normalized.split(" ").filter(Boolean);

      // İlk 10 kelimeyi alarak başlık varyasyonlarını biraz tolere eder
      return words.slice(0, 10).join(" ");
    }

    const deduped = new Map();

    works.forEach(work => {
      const rawTitle = work.title?.title?.value || "";
      const normalizedTitle = normalizeText(rawTitle);
      const signature = titleSignature(rawTitle);
      const doi = getDOI(work);

      let key = "";

      // 1) DOI varsa en güçlü eşleştirme
      if (doi) {
        key = `doi:${doi}`;
      } else {
        // 2) DOI yoksa başlık imzasına göre eşleştir
        key = `title:${signature}`;
      }

      if (!deduped.has(key)) {
        deduped.set(key, work);
      } else {
        const existing = deduped.get(key);
        deduped.set(key, chooseBetterWork(existing, work));
      }
    });

    works = Array.from(deduped.values());

    // Ek güvenlik katmanı:
    // Aynı başlık + aynı tür + çok benzer kayıtlar tekrar geldiyse ikinci kez temizle
    const secondPass = new Map();

    works.forEach(work => {
      const type = (work.type || "").toLowerCase();
      const year = work["publication-date"]?.year?.value || "";
      const titleKey = titleSignature(work.title?.title?.value || "");
      const doi = getDOI(work);

      const key = doi
        ? `doi2:${doi}`
        : `fallback:${titleKey}|${type}|${year}`;

      if (!secondPass.has(key)) {
        secondPass.set(key, work);
      } else {
        const existing = secondPass.get(key);
        secondPass.set(key, chooseBetterWork(existing, work));
      }
    });

    works = Array.from(secondPass.values());

    works.sort((a, b) => {
      const yearA = parseInt(a["publication-date"]?.year?.value || "0", 10);
      const yearB = parseInt(b["publication-date"]?.year?.value || "0", 10);

      if (yearB !== yearA) return yearB - yearA;

      const titleA = (a.title?.title?.value || "").toLowerCase();
      const titleB = (b.title?.title?.value || "").toLowerCase();
      return titleA.localeCompare(titleB);
    });

    const categorized = {
      "Journal Articles": [],
      "Books": [],
      "Book Chapters": [],
      "Other Publications": []
    };

    works.forEach(work => {
      const type = (work.type || "").toLowerCase();

      if (type === "journal-article") {
        categorized["Journal Articles"].push(work);
      } else if (type === "book") {
        categorized["Books"].push(work);
      } else if (type === "book-chapter") {
        categorized["Book Chapters"].push(work);
      } else {
        categorized["Other Publications"].push(work);
      }
    });

    function renderWork(work) {
      const title = work.title?.title?.value || "Untitled record";
      const journal = work["journal-title"]?.value || "";
      const year = work["publication-date"]?.year?.value || "";
      const type = (work.type || "").replaceAll("-", " ");
      const doi = getDOI(work);
      const recordUrl = getRecordUrl(work);

      let doiLink = "";
      let recordLink = "";

      if (doi) {
        doiLink = `<a class="pub-btn" href="https://doi.org/${doi}" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">DOI</a>`;
      }

      if (recordUrl) {
        recordLink = `<a class="pub-btn pub-btn-secondary" href="${recordUrl}" target="_blank" rel="noopener noreferrer">View Record</a>`;
      }

      return `
        <div class="pub-item">
          <div class="pub-title">${title}</div>
          ${journal ? `<div class="pub-journal">${journal}</div>` : ""}
          <div class="pub-meta">
            ${year ? `<span class="pub-badge">${year}</span>` : ""}
            ${type ? `<span class="pub-badge pub-badge-light">${type}</span>` : ""}
          </div>
          <div class="pub-links">
            ${doiLink}
            ${recordLink}
          </div>
        </div>
      `;
    }

    let html = "";

    Object.entries(categorized).forEach(([sectionTitle, items]) => {
      if (items.length === 0) return;

      html += `<h2 class="pub-section-title">${sectionTitle}</h2>`;
      html += `<div class="pub-wrapper">`;
      items.forEach(work => {
        html += renderWork(work);
      });
      html += `</div>`;
    });

    container.innerHTML = html;

  } catch (error) {
    container.innerHTML = `<p>Yayınlar yüklenirken hata oluştu: ${error.message}</p>`;
  }
}

loadPublications();
</script>
